/usr/bin/cc  -std=c11 -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -Wall -Wextra -O0 -g3 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-inline -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nDPId-test.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/nDPId-test.dir/nDPId-test.c.o" -o nDPId-test  libnDPI/lib/libndpi.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcap.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcap.so -lm -pthread
